title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Lite-8-PoE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: The USW-Lite-8-PoE is a fully managed Layer 2 switch with 8 Gigabit Ethernet ports for your RJ45 Ethernet devices. Four ports also offer auto-sensing 802.3at PoE+ that provide upto a total PoE wattage of 52W for UniFi Access Points or other PoE devices Managed and configured by the UniFi Network Controller with UniFi mobile app support, the USW-Lite-8-PoE offers Layer 2 switching protocols and features. The UniFi NetworkController and mobile app allow admins to configure and monitor virtually all of the switch features in a graphical user interface from anywhere The major difference between the UniFiSwitch and EdgeSwitch series switches is in management - WebGUI management of EdgeSwitch switches is replaced by the UniFi Controller on UniFi Switch models Device Wallmount holder Power adapter 54V / 1.1A Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 4 PoE budget [W] 52 Max. power consumption [W] 8 Power via connector/terminal 50 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Operating temperature [°C] 15 up to 40 Width [mm] 164 Height [mm] 32 Depth [mm] 100 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 16 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
